item.title: DEBT: Decompose EditorState into focused state objects
item.intent: EditorState is accumulating unrelated responsibilities — selection, find/replace, formatting, diagnostics, and undo should not share a single observable object
item.description: EditorState currently holds selection state (selectedRange, selectionWordCount, selectionRect), view mode (isSourceView), statistics (documentStats), find/replace (findReplaceState, applyFindHighlights), formatting shortcuts (performBold, performItalic, performLink), floating action bar focus (focusAISection), diagnostics (diagnostics, dismissedDiagnosticKeys), and undo manager. Extract into focused state structs: SelectionState, FormattingActions, DiagnosticsState. Compose them in EditorState so each concern is independently testable.
acceptanceCriteria: EditorState composes focused state objects rather than owning all properties directly
SelectionState, FormattingActions, and DiagnosticsState are independently testable
No behavioral change to editor functionality
Each sub-state is @Observable for SwiftUI reactivity
